_comment: Random Dot Motion Task - Configuration File
_instructions: Modify these parameters to change experiment behavior. All timing in seconds.

text.instructions:
RANDOM DOT MOTION TASK

You will first complete a sound phase. After that, you will perform a random dot motion task.

Press '{left_key}' for LEFT
Press '{right_key}' for RIGHT

Respond as QUICKLY and ACCURATELY as possible. Each motion trial has a limited response window.
Practice trials include feedback; the main experiment does not.

Press {continue_key} to begin the practice trials. Press {quit_key} at any time to exit.
text.practice_start:
PRACTICE TRIALS

You will now complete {n} practice trials of the motion task.
Press '{left_key}' for LEFT
Press '{right_key}' for RIGHT
Feedback will be provided after each response.

Press {continue_key} to begin.
text.practice_end:
Practice complete!

You scored {score}% correct.

The main experiment will now begin.
No feedback will be given.

Press {continue_key} to continue.
text.block_break:
Block {current} of {total} complete.

Take a short break.

Press {continue_key} when ready to continue.
text.end:
Experiment complete!

Thank you for participating.

Press {continue_key} to exit.
